name: codex-openai-proxy
description: A localhost-only OpenAI Chat Completions proxy for Codex app-server

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && npm run test:typecheck --silent && vitest run
scripts.test:live:hello: npm run build --silent && npm run test:typecheck --silent && vitest run --config vitest.live.config.js
